name: Dropbox Sign
description: Dropbox Sign is commonly used to support legal / risk workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Dropbox Sign when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in legal / risk work.
founderWorkflow: Use Dropbox Sign to keep legal / risk work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Dropbox Sign before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
